title: 21-Day Belief Awareness
description: Notice the belief underneath daily choices.

dailyTasks.prompt: Day 1: Name the belief most active today and choose one supporting action.
Day 2: Complete one small action before checking for outside approval.
Day 3: Notice a repeated pattern and interrupt it with one conscious pause.
Day 4: Write one piece of evidence that your identity is changing.
Day 5: Practice receiving support, appreciation, or feedback without deflecting.
Day 6: Protect one block of attention from avoidable interruption.
Day 7: Close one open loop that has been draining energy.
Day 8: Choose a response that your future self would recognize.
Day 9: Record one result without turning it into a judgment.
Day 10: Return to the practice after a drift without self-criticism.
Day 11: Name the belief most active today and choose one supporting action.
Day 12: Complete one small action before checking for outside approval.
Day 13: Notice a repeated pattern and interrupt it with one conscious pause.
Day 14: Write one piece of evidence that your identity is changing.
Day 15: Practice receiving support, appreciation, or feedback without deflecting.
Day 16: Protect one block of attention from avoidable interruption.
Day 17: Close one open loop that has been draining energy.
Day 18: Choose a response that your future self would recognize.
Day 19: Record one result without turning it into a judgment.
Day 20: Return to the practice after a drift without self-criticism.
Day 21: Name the belief most active today and choose one supporting action.
